channel.title: Sound Bath Calendar
channel.description: A curated, weekly-updated calendar of sound baths across Denver and the Front Range: Boulder, Fort Collins, and Colorado Springs. Every room worth knowing.

item.title: Midweek Harmony Reset - Sound Bath
item.description: A midweek restorative sound bath at The Denver Village in Aurora, Wednesday July 22 from 5:30-6:30 PM. Where: The Denver Village, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/midweek-harmony-reset-sound-bath-2026-07-22-the-denver-village/

item.title: Community Sound Bath
item.description: A community sound bath by Colorful Sound Vibrations at The Next Us in Colorado Springs, Wednesday evening; free. Where: The Next Us, Colorado Springs. Price: Free. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/community-sound-bath-2026-07-22-the-next-us/

item.title: Floating Sound Bath - Elise Nicole
item.description: A floating sound bath led by Elise Nicole at Camino Massage Therapy in Colorado Springs, Wednesday evening; $45. Where: Camino Massage Therapy, Colorado Springs. Price: $45. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/floating-sound-bath-elise-nicole-2026-07-22-camino-massage-therapy/

item.title: Wednesday Meditation
item.description: A weekly guided meditation with a sound bath component (crystal and Tibetan singing bowls, native flute or chanting) led by Norma at Unity of Boulder, Wednesday July 22 at 7:00 PM. Free. Where: Unity of Boulder Spiritual Center, Boulder. Price: Free (donations appreciated). Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/wednesday-meditation-2026-07-22-unity-of-boulder-spiritual-center/

item.title: Nourish: Women's Circle & Sound Bath
item.description: A women's circle and sound bath hosted by The Living Room in Fort Collins, Wednesday evening. Where: The Living Room, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/nourish-womens-circle-sound-bath-2026-07-22-the-living-room/

item.title: Gong Journey
item.description: A gong journey presented by Sound Murals at Harmonist Sanctuary in Denver, Wednesday evening. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/gong-journey-2026-07-22-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Thursday Mind Body Reset — Gong Journey
item.description: Weekly Thursday evening gong bath using multiple large gongs, followed by tea and community time; held at the studio near Horsetooth Reservoir. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch LLC, Fort Collins. Price: From $44.52. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/thursday-mind-body-reset-gong-journey-2026-07-23-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch-llc/

item.title: Thursday's Weekly Gong Journey
item.description: A weekly Thursday gong journey at Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch in Fort Collins, Thursday evening; $40. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Fort Collins. Price: $40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/thursdays-weekly-gong-journey-2026-07-23-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch/

item.title: Stretch & Sound
item.description: A 60-minute stretch-and-sound session with Christina Epps at Sacred Society in Denver's Highlands, Friday July 24 at 6:00 PM. Where: Sacred Society, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/stretch-sound-2026-07-24-sacred-society/

item.title: Friday Recharge: A Restorative Sound Journey
item.description: A restorative sound journey with Annmarie of ResoundingWell at Wildfire Arts Center in Fort Collins, Friday evening. Where: Wildfire Arts Center, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/friday-recharge-a-restorative-sound-journey-2026-07-24-wildfire-arts-center/

item.title: Reiki & Sound Bath feat. Megan Odom
item.description: A combined reiki and sound bath featuring Megan Odom at Singing Bowls of the Rockies in Colorado Springs, Friday evening; $45. Where: Singing Bowls of the Rockies, Colorado Springs. Price: $45. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/reiki-sound-bath-feat-megan-odom-2026-07-24-singing-bowls-of-the-rockies/

item.title: MindFree Fridays Sound Healing
item.description: The recurring MindFree Fridays evening sound healing at Karma Yoga Center on South Broadway, Friday July 24 at 7:00 PM (weekly series). Where: Karma Yoga Center, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/mindfree-fridays-sound-healing-2026-07-24-karma-yoga-center/

item.title: Activating Your Inner Fire: Guided Meditation and Sound Healing Immersion
item.description: A guided meditation and sound-healing immersion hosted by Soul Growth Network at 1545 S Pearl St, Denver, Friday evening. Where: 1545 S Pearl St, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/activating-your-inner-fire-guided-meditation-and-sound-healing-immersion-2026-07-24-1545-s-pearl-st/

item.title: 45-Minute Reset: Sound, Movement, Breath & Laughter
item.description: A 45-minute session of sound immersion, movement and breathwork led by Kochun-Ra at Inca Street Collective in La Alma-Lincoln Park, Friday July 24 at 7:15 PM. Where: Inca Street Collective, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/45minute-reset-sound-movement-breath-laughter-2026-07-24-inca-street-collective/

item.title: Circles of Connection: Sound Bath, Medicine Wheel, Nature Reflections
item.description: An outdoor gathering combining a sound bath, medicine wheel, and nature reflection, led by Sharay Fay. Where: La Foret Conference & Retreat Center, Colorado Springs. Price: $35-$50. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/circles-of-connection-sound-bath-medicine-wheel-nature-reflections-2026-07-25-la-foret-conference-retreat-center/

item.title: A Sound Bath to Unwind: Releasing Stress from Body & Mind
item.description: A sound bath focused on stress release at Singing Bowls of the Rockies in Colorado Springs, Saturday afternoon; $39. Where: Singing Bowls of the Rockies, Colorado Springs. Price: $39. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/a-sound-bath-to-unwind-releasing-stress-from-body-mind-2026-07-25-singing-bowls-of-the-rockies/

item.title: Creative Poetry Sound Bath
item.description: A sound bath with aromatherapy and space for writing and group sharing, hosted by All Things Serene at Harmonist Sanctuary on East Colfax, Denver, Saturday at 5pm. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/creative-poetry-sound-bath-2026-07-25-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Crystal & Gong Sound Concert in the Salt Cave
item.description: Salt-cave sound concert with crystal bowls and gong led by Ann Martin at 5 Star Salt Caves on South Pearl Street, Saturday July 25; $60. Where: 5 Star Salt Caves Wellness Center, Denver. Price: $60. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/crystal-gong-sound-concert-in-the-salt-cave-2026-07-25-5-star-salt-caves-wellness-center/

item.title: Sound Bath: Sacred Rest Ritual
item.description: A sound bath framed as a rest ritual at Sacred Society in Denver, Sunday morning. Where: Sacred Society, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sound-bath-sacred-rest-ritual-2026-07-26-sacred-society/

item.title: Cosmic Yoga and Sound Bath for a Summer Shift
item.description: A yoga and sound bath led by Joy Childress at Camdazco Farm in the Boulder area, Sunday afternoon. Where: Camdazco Farm, Boulder. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/cosmic-yoga-and-sound-bath-for-a-summer-shift-2026-07-26-camdazco-farm/

item.title: Colorado Salt Cave w/Sound Healing
item.description: A sound-healing session inside the Colorado Salt Cave in Colorado Springs, hosted by the Essential Wellness Society of Colorado, Sunday afternoon; $65. Where: Colorado Salt Cave, Colorado Springs. Price: $65. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/colorado-salt-cave-wsound-healing-2026-07-26-colorado-salt-cave/

item.title: Buck Moon Sound Bath
item.description: A Buck Moon sound bath led by Shelby Moor at The Denver Village, Sunday evening. Where: The Denver Village, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/buck-moon-sound-bath-2026-07-26-the-denver-village/

item.title: Good Morning Outdoor Sound Journey
item.description: Morning outdoor sound journey held at Old Canal Park; donation-based. Where: Old Canal Park, Fort Collins. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/good-morning-outdoor-sound-journey-2026-07-27-old-canal-park/

item.title: Breathwork + Sound Healing Immersion
item.description: A breathwork and sound-healing immersion hosted by Soul Growth Network at 1545 S Pearl St, Denver, Monday evening. Where: 1545 S Pearl St, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/breathwork-sound-healing-immersion-2026-07-27-1545-s-pearl-st/

item.title: Dreamtime Journeys: A Shamanic Sound Journey Experience
item.description: A shamanic-style sound journey at Soulshines Yoga Studio & Healing Arts in Colorado Springs, hosted by the Universal Metaphysics group, Monday evening; $40. Where: Soulshines Yoga Studio & Healing Arts, Colorado Springs. Price: $40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/dreamtime-journeys-a-shamanic-sound-journey-experience-2026-07-27-soulshines-yoga-studio-healing-arts/

item.title: Gong Bath with Beth
item.description: A recurring Monday-evening gong bath led by Beth at Una Vida Meditation & Movement in Longmont, Monday July 27 at 7:15 PM. Where: Una Vida Meditation & Movement, Boulder. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/gong-bath-with-beth-2026-07-27-una-vida-meditation-movement/

item.title: Singing Bowls at the Gardens: Sunrise to Starlight
item.description: A reclined singing-bowl and gong sound meditation with Ann Martin in Mitchell Hall at Denver Botanic Gardens, Tuesday July 28 at 5:30 PM; $25 general, $22 members. Where: Denver Botanic Gardens, Mitchell Hall, Denver. Price: $25. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/singing-bowls-at-the-gardens-sunrise-to-starlight-2026-07-28-denver-botanic-gardens-mitchell-hall/

item.title: Sound Immersion with the Harmonic Quintessence (Hg)
item.description: A sound immersion led by Vialet B Rayne at Merritt Wellness in Denver, Tuesday evening; $70. Where: Merritt Wellness, Denver. Price: $70. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sound-immersion-with-the-harmonic-quintessence-hg-2026-07-28-merritt-wellness/

item.title: Outdoor Full Moon Gong Journey
item.description: An outdoor full-moon gong journey by Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch in Fort Collins, Wednesday evening; $42–47. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Fort Collins. Price: $42–47. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/outdoor-full-moon-gong-journey-2026-07-29-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch/

item.title: Feng Shui Sound Bath: Children, Creativity & Joy
item.description: A feng-shui-themed sound bath presented by The Oracle Collective at Firiel Skin Care in Boulder, Wednesday evening. Where: Firiel Skin Care, Boulder. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/feng-shui-sound-bath-children-creativity-joy-2026-07-29-firiel-skin-care/

item.title: Sunset Reset: Poolside Full Moon Sound Bath
item.description: A poolside full-moon sound bath by Singing Bowls of the Rockies at Ascend Spa & Wellness, Hotel Polaris, in Colorado Springs, Wednesday evening. Where: Ascend Spa & Wellness at Hotel Polaris, Colorado Springs. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sunset-reset-poolside-full-moon-sound-bath-2026-07-29-ascend-spa-wellness-at-hotel-polaris/

item.title: Candlelight Sound Bath
item.description: A candlelit sound bath with crystal singing bowls and chimes, hosted by Liminal Lemonade at Harmonist Sanctuary on East Colfax, Denver, Wednesday evening at 7:15pm. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/candlelight-sound-bath-2026-07-29-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.title: Full Moon Sound Bath
item.description: A full-moon sound bath hosted by Revive Wellness at 929 29th St in Denver, Thursday evening; donation-based. Where: 929 29th St, Denver. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/full-moon-sound-bath-2026-07-30-929-29th-st/

item.title: Relaxing Soundbath at the Seedlings Dome
item.description: A sound bath led by Zach Miller at the Seedlings Dome on Hartman Street in Fort Collins, Thursday evening. Where: The Seedlings Dome at Hartman Street, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/relaxing-soundbath-at-the-seedlings-dome-2026-07-30-the-seedlings-dome-at-hartman-street/

item.title: Full Moon Meditation & Six Gong Relaxation
item.description: A full-moon meditation and six-gong relaxation led by Pavanjeet at The StarHouse in Boulder, Thursday evening. Where: The StarHouse, Boulder. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/full-moon-meditation-six-gong-relaxation-2026-07-30-the-starhouse/

item.title: Community Candle lit sound bath
item.description: A community candlelit sound bath hosted by Think Positive Club at The Next Us in Colorado Springs, Friday evening; donation-based. Where: The Next Us, Colorado Springs. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/community-candle-lit-sound-bath-2026-07-31-the-next-us/

item.title: Full Moon Sound Medicine Journey
item.description: A full-moon sound journey hosted by Soul Growth Network at 1545 S Pearl St, Denver, Friday evening. Where: 1545 S Pearl St, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/full-moon-sound-medicine-journey-2026-07-31-1545-s-pearl-st/

item.title: Vagus Nerve Activation Sound Bath - Reconnect with Inner Peace
item.description: A sound bath themed around vagus-nerve relaxation at Singing Bowls of the Rockies in Colorado Springs, Friday evening; $39. Where: Singing Bowls of the Rockies, Colorado Springs. Price: $39. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/vagus-nerve-activation-sound-bath-reconnect-with-inner-peace-2026-07-31-singing-bowls-of-the-rockies/

item.title: Psychic Sound Bath Wash Park
item.description: Outdoor sound bath with singing bowls and gongs led by Dr. Adrian Voss at Washington Park, Saturday August 1 at 3:00 PM; free. Where: Washington Park, Denver. Price: Free. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/psychic-sound-bath-wash-park-2026-08-01-washington-park/

item.title: Sacred Roots Gathering Sound Bath
item.description: A sound bath led by Norabell Dechant at Verdant Nature Creations in Fort Collins, Saturday afternoon. Where: Verdant Nature Creations, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sacred-roots-gathering-sound-bath-2026-08-01-verdant-nature-creations/

item.title: Kundalini in the Park
item.description: An outdoor kundalini and sound session led by Pavanjeet at North Boulder Park, Sunday morning; donation-based. Where: North Boulder Park, Boulder. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/kundalini-in-the-park-2026-08-02-north-boulder-park/

item.title: Sundays of Sound - Mind Body Reset Gong Journey
item.description: Sunday morning gong journey using multiple large gongs for deep relaxation, held at the Fort Collins studio. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch LLC, Fort Collins. Price: From $44.52. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sundays-of-sound-mind-body-reset-gong-journey-2026-08-02-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch-llc/

item.title: Sunday Morning of Sound Gong Journey - Horsetooth Reservoir
item.description: A morning gong journey at Horsetooth Reservoir near Fort Collins, hosted by Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Sunday morning; $41–46. Where: Rocky Mountain Restore & Stretch, Fort Collins. Price: $41–46. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sunday-morning-of-sound-gong-journey-horsetooth-reservoir-2026-08-02-rocky-mountain-restore-stretch/

item.title: AcuDetox & Sound Bath Journey Experience
item.description: An acupuncture-detox and sound bath journey facilitated by Terri Slezak at North Of Ordinary Collective in Boulder, Sunday August 2 at 1:00 PM. Sliding scale $27–$44. Where: North Of Ordinary Collective, Boulder. Price: $27–$44 sliding scale. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/acudetox-sound-bath-journey-experience-2026-08-02-north-of-ordinary-collective/

item.title: Energy Healing + Sound Bath Immersion
item.description: An energy-healing and sound bath session led by Kathy Sietos at Green Light Reiki in Denver, Sunday afternoon. Where: Green Light Reiki, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/energy-healing-sound-bath-immersion-2026-08-02-green-light-reiki/

item.description: A Sunday sound bath at Singing Bowls of the Rockies in Colorado Springs, Sunday afternoon; $39. Where: Singing Bowls of the Rockies, Colorado Springs. Price: $39. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/selfcare-sunday-sound-bath-a-path-to-wellness-and-peace-2026-08-02-singing-bowls-of-the-rockies/

item.description: A sound journey with Annmarie of ResoundingWell at Live Beyond Limit in Fort Collins, Sunday evening. Where: Live Beyond Limit, Fort Collins. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/harvesting-intentions-a-sound-journey-into-gratitude-2026-08-02-live-beyond-limit/

item.description: A communal quartz-bowl sound bath hosted by Colorado Psychedelic Church in Colorado Springs, Monday evening; donation-based. Where: Colorado Psychedelic Church, Colorado Springs. Price: Donation. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/communal-quartz-sound-bath-2026-08-03-colorado-psychedelic-church/

Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/somatic-breathwork-sound-bath-2026-08-04-singing-bowls-of-the-rockies/

item.description: A restorative sound bath and guided meditation led by IzaBelle Sweet at the Denver Public Library's Woodbury Branch, Tuesday evening; $15–40. Where: Denver Public Library: Woodbury Branch Library, Denver. Price: $15–40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/deep-restorative-sound-bath-guided-meditation-2026-08-04-denver-public-library-woodbury-branch-library/

item.description: A sound bath from the Denver Sound Bath Collective, led by IzaBelle Sweet, at the Denver Public Library's Smiley Branch, Wednesday evening; $15–40. Where: Denver Public Library: Smiley Branch Library, Denver. Price: $15–40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/denver-sound-bath-collectivesmiley-2026-08-05-denver-public-library-smiley-branch-library/

Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sound-bath-ceremony-2026-08-06-una-vida-meditation-movement/

item.description: A sound bath led by Dawn Stratton and Vialet Rayne at Discover Your Spiritual Gifts in Denver, Friday afternoon; $40. Where: Discover Your Spiritual Gifts, Denver. Price: $40. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/sacred-sound-bath-dawn-stratton-vialet-rayne-2026-08-07-discover-your-spiritual-gifts/

item.description: A partner co-regulation sound bath using crystal singing bowls at The Denver Village in Aurora, Friday August 7 from 6:00-7:00 PM. Where: The Denver Village, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/coregulation-sound-bath-2026-08-07-the-denver-village/

item.description: A First Friday sound bath presented by Liminal Lemonade at Harmonist Sanctuary in Denver, Friday evening. Where: Harmonist Sanctuary, Denver. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/first-friday-flow-state-sound-bath-2026-08-07-harmonist-sanctuary/

item.description: An outdoor sunset gong bath led by Pavanjeet at North Boulder Park in Boulder, Tuesday evening. Where: North Boulder Park, Boulder. Details: https://soundbathcalendar.com/event/solar-eclipse-sunset-gong-bath-2026-08-11-north-boulder-park/
